strengths: Shipped real-time microservices at Dunnhumby handling millions of RPS with event-driven architecture, low-latency optimization, and high-performance databases—the core technical foundation for multi-agent AI frameworks.
Currently architecting AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating hands-on engagement with agentic frameworks and active capability-building in the domain.

Seventeen-year full-stack career with open-source architecture leadership (GISCollective, trial, fluent-asserts) and Kubernetes deployment experience, showing learning velocity and ability to design complex systems.
concerns: Multi-agent AI production experience is nascent (3 months at re:cinq); no demonstrated track record of shipping, scaling, or operationalizing multi-agent systems in production for business outcomes.

No fintech-infrastructure background; RIDE (investment tools) and Optilyz (direct-mail pricing) are adjacent but lack demonstrated expertise in credit systems, payment flows, working-capital algorithms, or regulated fintech operations.

No clear evidence of team leadership or organizational scaling; resume lists Senior/Staff titles but does not demonstrate experience managing engineering teams 10→30+ or building internal technical leadership layers.
response.justification: Bogdan's production mastery of real-time microservices architecture at Dunnhumby—handling millions of requests per second with event-driven design and low-latency optimization—directly demonstrates the core technical capability required to architect event-driven multi-agent frameworks. His current role architecting AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq signals active engagement with the domain and recent upskilling trajectory. His 17-year career, open-source architecture leadership, and proven learning velocity across diverse tech stacks establish credibility for learning fintech infrastructure and growing into organizational leadership with executive support. The primary gap is nascent multi-agent production experience (3 months); however, his architectural foundation and recent agentic-AI trajectory suggest rapid capability development is credible. Team-scaling evidence and fintech-infrastructure knowledge are underdeveloped but addressable through strong CFO, board, and finance-leadership partnership.
